name: Email Triage to Karbon Project Assignment
description: Email triage to Karbon project assignment workflow with redaction, AI classification, confidence-based routing, and dual Slack channel notifications for both confident assignments and manual review items.

options.systemMessage: You are an email triage classifier for a bookkeeping practice. You ONLY output structured JSON matching the required schema. Never include extra commentary.

parameters.jsonSchemaExample: {"matched_project_id":"WI-1023","confidence":"high","reasoning":"Email mentions November receipts, matching the Monthly Bookkeeping - Nov 2025 project.","suggested_category":"Reply"}

parameters.url: <__PLACEHOLDER_VALUE__Karbon API endpoint to add a note/link to a Work Item, e.g. https://api.karbonhq.com/v3/WorkItems/{id}/Notes__>

channelId.value: <__PLACEHOLDER_VALUE__Slack channel ID for AI-confident assignments, e.g. karbon-assignments__>

parameters.url: <__PLACEHOLDER_VALUE__Karbon API endpoint to create a Triage item, e.g. https://api.karbonhq.com/v3/Triage__>

channelId.value: <__PLACEHOLDER_VALUE__Slack channel ID for manual review, e.g. karbon-needs-review__>

parameters.content:
## GOAL
Automatically triage incoming client emails for the bookkeeping practice:
1. Redact sensitive financial data (SSNs, account/routing numbers, etc.) before any AI sees it
2. Identify which Karbon client and open Work Item (project) the email relates to
3. Route to the right Karbon destination AND always notify Slack

**Both paths now notify Slack:**
- checkmark High confidence -> Auto-linked to Karbon -> posts to #karbon-assignments
- warning Low/medium confidence -> Karbon Triage item created -> posts to #karbon-needs-review

Companion workflow: "Karbon Daily Triage Digest" handles the once-a-day summary check-in.

## Karbon API Placeholders

The HTTP Request nodes pointing to Karbon need:
1. Your Karbon API base URL
2. A "Karbon API" credential (Header Auth) with your API key
3. Correct endpoint paths for WorkItems / Triage

See Karbon API docs to fill these in.

## OUTCOME: High Confidence
When the AI is confident (confidence = "high"):

- Email is auto-linked to the matched Karbon Work Item with AI reasoning as an audit note
- A Slack message is posted to #karbon-assignments confirming the assignment
- No human action needed -- but you are still informed every time

Set the channel ID in node 7a. Notify Karbon Added.

## OUTCOME: Needs Review
When confidence is "medium" or "low":

- A Karbon Triage item is created (unassigned), tagged with the AI best-guess project + reasoning
- A Slack message is posted to #karbon-needs-review with the AI suggestion
- You make the final call on which project it belongs to

Set the channel ID in node 7b. Notify Needs Review.

## Slack Channel Setup

Two channels, two purposes:

#karbon-assignments (suggested name)
Receives a checkmark message every time AI confidently assigns an email to a Karbon project. FYI only -- no action needed.

#karbon-needs-review (suggested name)
Receives a warning message when AI is unsure. Someone needs to open Karbon Triage and assign manually.

Set both channel IDs in nodes 7a and 7b before activating.
